evidence_quotes.quote: the destruction of video games at the end of their lifecycle

paragraphs.text: Dear Members of the EU Commission, As both a citizen of the EU and an avid consumer of video games, the issue of the destruction of video games at the end of their lifecycle is of pressing interest to me. This is because video games are works of art and part of our cultural legacy. Destroying these games because they reach the end of their lifecycle robs future generations of a piece of their heritage and is also an anti-consumer policy. This issue goes hand in hand with other issues presented in the Digital Fairness Act and would be a great addition to the act. I implore you to take this issue into account, given its urgency. Thank you for your time and attention. Kind Regards, A concerned citizen
